display.purpose: Race distance numerals on category cards only. Never used for prose or section headings.

hero.purpose: Homepage hero heading (H1). Used once per page. Three lines: location tag, race name, year.

headline.purpose: Section headings (H2). Bold civic authority. Caps at 3rem.

label.purpose: Section tags, column headers, badge text. Used sparingly — not as scaffold above every section.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Dark-world category cards only. Never on light-background surfaces.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (hover, focus). 200ms duration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Full-pill, Race Orange background. Used for registration and primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f97316; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 16px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ea580c; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action alongside primary CTA in hero. Transparent with white border on dark backgrounds.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 16px 40px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms, background 200ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.50); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.50); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Category Card
components.description: Race category tile. Dark gradient surface, Black Ops One distance numeral, category name + pricing.
components.html:
21.1

KM

Half Marathon

Open 18+

Early bird₹699
Regular₹999
components.css: .ds-category-card { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #3f3f46 0%, #27272a 55%, #18181b 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(63,63,70,0.60); border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 280px; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.22), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); transition: border-color 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-category-card:hover { border-color: rgba(249,115,22,0.50); } .ds-category-card__distance { text-align: right; } .ds-category-card__num { font-family: 'Black Ops One', Impact, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 5.5rem); color: #ffffff; line-height: 1; } .ds-category-card__unit { font-family: 'Black Ops One', Impact, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); color: #f97316; line-height: 1; } .ds-category-card__name { color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-category-card__age { color: #a1a1aa; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-category-card__divider { border-top: 1px solid #27272a; margin: 12px 0; } .ds-category-card__row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-category-card__label { color: #d4d4d8; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-category-card__label--muted { color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-category-card__price { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 900; } .ds-category-card__price--early { color: #ffffff; } .ds-category-card__price--regular { color: #d4d4d8; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation link. Zinc-400 at rest, white on hover, orange on active route.
components.html: CategoriesPrizes
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 32px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav__link--active { color: #f97316; } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase orange tag used for geographic/event identifiers (e.g. 'AMRAVATI, MAHARASHTRA'). Not a scaffold above every section.
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f97316; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.25em; }

narrative.overview:
This design system is a broadsheet printed on a letterpress, not a digital product. Bold black ink, one saturated orange, athletic display type. Like a start-line poster nailed to a lamp post at 5 AM in Amravati — specific to this place, made for these people, not templated for a market. The energy is civic pride, not fitness branding.

The system lives in two registers that coexist throughout the site. The dark world — black body, near-black surfaces, white type, orange highlights — is the race itself: pre-dawn, adrenaline, the starting gun. The light world — white and zinc-50 backgrounds, dark text — is the practical layer: fees, tables, forms, content the runner needs to read carefully.

This system rejects the generic Mumbai fitness startup aesthetic. It rejects the cluttered government sports board look. And it rejects acid maximalism — wrong tone for a community race that includes children and families.
keyCharacteristics: Two-world layout: cinematic dark for hero/navigation/gallery, clean white for content
Orange used only where it earns its place: CTAs, key numbers, brand wordmark accent
Display type (Black Ops One) reserved strictly for distance numerics
Depth through tonal layering in zinc, not decorative shadows
All four race categories treated with equal visual dignity

rules.name: The One-Orange Rule
rules.body: Orange appears on fewer than 15% of any screen's visual weight. Its rarity is the point. When everything is orange, nothing is urgent. Orange marks the race start; it doesn't redecorate the course.

rules.name: The Two-World Rule
rules.body: Dark and light sections alternate with structural purpose, not decorative variety. Dark = race atmosphere. Light = information the runner studies. Never blend them with gradients between sections.

rules.name: The One Typeface Rule
rules.body: Geist handles all prose, headings, and UI. Black Ops One handles distance numerals. Notable handles the wordmark. These roles never overlap.

rules.name: The Distance-Only Rule
rules.body: Black Ops One appears exclusively on race distance numerals. Applying it to any other text makes it decorative. Its power is that it means exactly one thing: the distance you're committing to run.

rules.name: The Flat-Light Rule
rules.body: Light-world surfaces carry no box shadows. Depth comes from background-color differentiation within the zinc-50/white/zinc-100 ramp.

dos: Do use orange exclusively for high-intent elements: CTA buttons, distance numerals, the wordmark accent, live pricing calls-to-action.
Do keep light sections on pure white or zinc-50.
Do use Geist at weight 900 for all section headlines.
Do reserve Black Ops One for distance numerals only.
Do test contrast on every orange-on-dark surface — orange-500 on black is 3.0:1, sufficient for large/bold text only.
Do apply text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on prose.
Do treat all four race categories with equal visual dignity.
donts: Don't use a near-white warm-tinted body background (cream, sand, parchment, ivory).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't add a side-stripe border (border-left > 1px as colored accent) to cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't make the design look like a generic Mumbai fitness startup: no near-white body with subtle gradient CTAs, no Outfit/DM Sans/Inter as brand voice.
Don't make it look like a government sports board site.
Don't put eyebrow labels above every section as structural scaffold.
Don't apply border-radius: 32px+ to anything except category cards (which intentionally use 24px).
Don't pair the ghost button border with an additional box shadow.
Don't use the hero heading scale (7rem) below the root hero.
